src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Refactor SecurityFilterChain configuration to use the new Spring Security 6.x / Spring Authorization Server 1.x DSL, replacing the deprecated OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer and manual HttpSecurity chaining.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced manual HttpSecurity chaining and OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer application with http.oauth2AuthorizationServer() and http.exceptionHandling() DSL methods.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Remove custom OidcUserInfo mapping logic that relied on deprecated or removed internal APIs for customizing the UserInfo endpoint response.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Deleted the userInfoMapper function and the associated oidc(userInfoEndpoint) configuration block.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add @EnableWebSecurity annotation to explicitly enable web security configuration, which is required in newer Spring Security versions when using Java config.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added @EnableWebSecurity annotation to the AuthorizationServerConfig class.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update import statements to reflect the new package structure and API changes in Spring Security 6.x and Spring Authorization Server 1.x.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced imports like OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer with OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfiguration and added imports for Customizer, MediaTypeRequestMatcher, etc.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate Jackson imports from com.fasterxml.jackson to tools.jackson to align with Spring Boot 3.5+ dependency changes.
Update JsonGenerator creation to use the new API method createGenerator on ObjectMapper instead of getFactory().createGenerator.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: JsonGenerator jsonGenerator = objectMapper.createGenerator(response.getOutputStream(), JsonEncoding.UTF8);

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate Jackson imports from com.fasterxml.jackson to tools.jackson to align with Spring Boot 3.5+ dependency changes.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: import tools.jackson.core.JsonEncoding;

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update JsonGenerator creation to use the new API method available in the migrated Jackson version.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: JsonGenerator jsonGenerator = objectMapper.createGenerator(response.getOutputStream(), JsonEncoding.UTF8);

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate Jackson imports from com.fasterxml.jackson to tools.jackson to align with Spring Boot 3.5+ dependency changes.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: import tools.jackson.core.JsonEncoding; import tools.jackson.core.JsonGenerator; import tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update JsonGenerator creation to use the new API method available in the migrated Jackson version.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: JsonGenerator jsonGenerator = objectMapper.createGenerator(response.getOutputStream(), JsonEncoding.UTF8);

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity authorization configuration from the deprecated fluent API to the lambda-based DSL required in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: http.authorizeHttpRequests(requestMatcherRegistry -> requestMatcherRegistry.requestMatchers(...).permitAll()...)

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate CSRF configuration from the deprecated fluent API to the lambda-based DSL required in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: http.csrf(AbstractHttpConfigurer::disable)

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate logout configuration from the deprecated fluent API to the lambda-based DSL required in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: http.logout(logoutCustomizer -> logoutCustomizer.logoutUrl(...))

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate form login configuration from the deprecated fluent API to the lambda-based DSL required in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: http.formLogin(formLoginCustomizer -> formLoginCustomizer.failureHandler(...))

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate exception handling configuration from the deprecated fluent API to the lambda-based DSL required in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: http.exceptionHandling(exceptionHandlingCustomizer -> exceptionHandlingCustomizer.accessDeniedHandler(...))

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate from custom captcha logic to the tianai-captcha library to support advanced captcha types like sliders and rotation.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced imports and fields with `ImageCaptchaApplication` and `TACBuilder` from `cloud.tianai.captcha`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update the captcha generation endpoint to use the new library's API for generating various captcha types.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed `captchaGraph` to `genCaptcha` returning `ApiResponse<ImageCaptchaVO>` using `imageCaptchaApplication.generateCaptcha`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update the captcha verification endpoint to use the new library's matching logic.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed `captchaSms` to `checkCaptcha` accepting `Data` body and calling `imageCaptchaApplication.matching`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Remove endpoints for raw image printing and base64 encoding as they are handled by the new library or are no longer needed.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Deleted `captchaGraphPrint` and `captchaGraphBase64` methods.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Implement `InitializingBean` to configure the captcha application with resources and templates on startup.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `afterPropertiesSet` method using `TACBuilder` to add default templates and resources.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add a static inner class to handle the request body structure for the new captcha verification endpoint.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `public static class Data` with `id` and `ImageCaptchaTrack data` fields.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Rename the generic list field from 'data' to 'rows' to better reflect its semantic meaning as a collection of records.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: private List<T> data; -> private List<T> rows;

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Remove the 'draw' field and its associated getter/setter methods, likely simplifying the pagination contract.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: private int draw; ... public int getDraw() ... public void setDraw(int draw) ...

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Rename 'recordsFiltered' to 'total' to simplify the terminology for the total count of records.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: private long recordsFiltered; -> private long total;

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Rename 'recordsTotal' to 'pages' to indicate that this field now represents the total number of pages rather than total records.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: private long recordsTotal; -> private long pages;
